nodes.label: Clipify PWA Icon (192x192)
nodes.rationale: A purple gradient double-overlapping play-button icon representing the Clipify video automation tool. Configured as a maskable PWA icon to ensure correct display across user devices.

nodes.label: Clipify Progressive Web App
nodes.rationale: Clipify supports PWA installation with standalone display, a white background/theme color, and Twitch play-button branding, optimizing mobile engagement for channel dashboards.
